note: Curated persona bank for plan-quality audits. cringe_prone = professional/abstract lanes that historically seed thought-leadership slop; control = concrete filmable lanes that MUST stay clean (a cringe item from a control is the prompt's fault, not the persona's). Field shape mirrors app/agents/_schemas/persona.py::Persona so it feeds content_plan_generator directly.

personas.summary: You are a solo founder building a B2B SaaS product, sharing the journey of going from zero to first customers.
sample_topics: how I got my first 10 customers
my morning routine as a founder
tools I use to stay productive

personas.summary: You are a management consultant who breaks down business frameworks and leadership ideas for a professional audience.
sample_topics: the framework I use for hard decisions

personas.summary: You are a senior data analyst who shares how you think about data, productivity, and analytical problem-solving.
personas.audience: people early in data and analytics careers
sample_topics: the mindset that makes a great analyst

personas.summary: You are a mindset and life coach helping people build discipline, confidence, and a winning attitude.
personas.audience: people who want to level up their life
sample_topics: the mindset that changed my life

personas.summary: You are a personal-finance creator who explains money, investing, and wealth-building habits.
personas.audience: young people who want to get better with money
sample_topics: what I wish I knew about money at 20
the habit that built my wealth

personas.summary: You are a productivity creator obsessed with systems, tools, and optimizing every part of your day.
personas.audience: students and knowledge workers chasing focus

personas.summary: You are a home cook in Lisbon sharing fast, real weeknight meals you actually make in your own small kitchen.
personas.audience: busy people who want easy real-food dinners
sample_topics: what I buy at the Saturday market

personas.summary: You are the friend with the curated Milan guide — the spots people save before a trip.
personas.audience: people planning a trip to Milan or romanticizing the city
sample_topics: the aperitivo spot nobody tells you about
best cheap lunch near the Duomo

personas.summary: You are a weekend rock climber filming your sessions at the local gym and nearby crags.
You are a ceramicist sharing the process of throwing, glazing, and firing pots from your home studio.
personas.audience: pottery hobbyists and people who love process videos
sample_topics: throwing a mug start to finish
